overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, covered walkways with cyan lighting, and a large open plaza with massive holographic billboards. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing wet reflective surfaces, dense urban architecture, and atmospheric neon lighting throughout the environment.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway at night, with concrete stairs and modern benches visible. The camera walks forward along the wet concrete surface, passing large planters with vegetation. Around 8 seconds, the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive neon-lit skyscraper towering above, showcasing the futuristic architecture before continuing along the walkway beneath the elevated transit track.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway bathed in cyan-green neon light from vertical poles lining the path. The camera moves steadily forward beneath the massive transit overpass structure, passing concrete support pillars. The wet pavement reflects the green neon lighting. A pedestrian in a white jacket walks toward the camera, and a person sits on one of the modern benches along the right side.

events.description: approaching stairs leading up to open plaza with visible digital screens ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through covered corridor toward an opening, approaching stairs leading to a plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the plaza entrance

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow edges leading up to the plaza level
large dark entrance to building with red interior lighting visible
silver metal safety railing along the right side of the walkway
illuminated advertising screen visible through the corridor opening

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the covered corridor which gradually opens up, revealing stairs on the left leading to an upper plaza. The green neon lighting fades as the scene transitions toward a more open area. A pedestrian walks ahead toward the building entrance visible in the distance, where red lighting and large digital screens become visible through the corridor opening.

entered.detail: giant floating holographic display showing abstract blue and orange shapes against the night sky
tall wall of multiple digital screens displaying advertisements with cyan and red lighting
expansive dark paved area with scattered debris and wet reflective surface
large building facade illuminated with red neon accent lighting along the roofline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast urban plaza surrounded by massive digital displays. A giant holographic billboard floats on the left showing abstract imagery, while the right side features a towering wall of digital advertising screens with cyan and red lighting. The camera walks across the open paved area, passing a pedestrian in a blue tank top and palm trees planted in square cutouts. The environment is exposed to the night sky with red accent lighting visible on distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, elevated pedestrian walkway into a vast, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins by moving along wet concrete past modern benches and planters, tilting upward to reveal a towering futuristic skyscraper before proceeding beneath a massive transit track. As the camera enters a covered corridor, the environment shifts into a space bathed in cyan-green neon light reflecting off the pavement, passing concrete pillars and a few scattered pedestrians. The scene then opens up as the green lighting fades, leading the camera through a corridor opening toward distant red lights and digital screens. Finally, the path expands into a wide open plaza dominated by giant holographic billboards and towering walls of digital advertising under a dark night sky.
